## Category

<!-- Check ONE that applies -->
- [ ] `[DEPLOY]` - Changes to deployable kit files (`deploy/`)
- [ ] `[DOCS]` - Documentation changes (`docs/`)
- [ ] `[QA]` - Test additions/updates (`qa/`)
- [ ] `[REPO]` - CI/CD, repo scripts, root configs

<!-- Describe what you changed and why -->

<!-- List any files added, removed, or moved. This affects FILE_MAPPING.md -->
- Added:
- Removed:
- Moved:

## Testing Done

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Files are in the correct directory per [FILE_MAPPING.md](../FILE_MAPPING.md)
- [ ] Branch naming follows convention: `{type}/{description}`
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files included
- [ ] If `[DEPLOY]`: Tested the deploy zip builds correctly
- [ ] If `[DOCS]`: Verified docs build locally with `mkdocs serve`
